title: zinnia zinnioides
intro: Zinnia zinnioides, also known as Mexican zinnia, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Zinnia zinnioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, flu, and skin irritations.
